tasks.title: Address strict linting violations (500-line files, 40-line functions, complexity 10)
tasks.notes: Enforce the 500/40/10 linter contract on every *.rs file in the workspace, including JS/TS/JSX/TSX spec-implementation code. No exemptions. cargo check lists remaining violations.

tasks.title: Implement the typed HIR execution model
tasks.notes: Type-aware HIR + trampoline interpreter aligned with JS/TS/JSX/TSX. Quick-win spec fixes are Phase 0; foundation/value model/trampoline are Phases 1-3. No stubs — unimplemented features throw.

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Replace recursive interpreter with heap-allocated Vec<CallFrame> and trampoline loop. Required by typed HIR Phase 2.

tasks.title: Leverage Rust for runtime execution model
tasks.notes: Apply Rust ownership/explicit-stack/ecosystem patterns. Supports Task 85 and 264.

tasks.title: Implement real Promise resolution and microtasks
tasks.notes: Replace stub Promise with real thenable queue and microtask scheduling.

tasks.title: Implement native ES module support for Quench apps
tasks.notes: Load and link real ES modules instead of stripping imports/exports.

tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: Documented blockers: recursive interpreter stack overflow, global CURRENT_DEPTH counter, huge unsupported feature surface, baseline/harness gaps, runtime bugs.
